title: Chapter 352
content:
Chapter 352: Chapter 352 : Doomed Expert With Thirteen Receipts

His words left his mouth anyway. "Quick question, master."

Astrid gulped the second she recognized the tone. There was absolutely zero fear in it. Instead it carried that painfully familiar ring she had come to dread from Jax.

Her head slowly drifted away from the imaginary dick she was desperately trying to picture. Not that she was successfully picturing anything, because Astrid had genuinely never seen a cock in her entire life. Nobody had ever taught her about sex either, since the few times the topic accidentally surfaced near her she found the whole concept so disgusting that she refused to hear another word.

Jax continued the instant her hissing gaze met his. "But before I get to the question, are you feeling well? Are you scared of something? Maybe another far scarier monster?"

Her mana blade swung wildly through the air without caring that it could actually kill him right here. Jax used every ounce of strength to snap free from the thread bindings and hurl himself sideways.

Then he dramatically dropped onto all fours and pressed his face against the violet ground while desperately hiding the laughter shaking his body. "This humble servant of yours was merely worried about you, ma’am."

He could hear the grinding of her teeth and knew very well he was playing with fire. But his mouth simply did not stop. He curiously studied the ego-ravaged expression on Astrid’s face. "I was just wondering, is this whole thing simply a prank to get revenge on me? Or is it that you were reconsidering your harsh actions and that is why you halted?"

He pressed a finger to his chin and thought dramatically like some detective. "But wait. That still does not explain the shock that visibly shook your body. There are too many mysteries I have yet to solve."

Then he looked at Astrid with dawning horror. "Do not tell me my earlier assumption was actually right. Did the monster currently fighting inside these pants actually scare the real monster into hiding?" His voice shifted into something disgustingly gentle. "If that is truly the case, then you really should not be scared, my lady."

He casually traced the shape of his bulging cock through his pants. "This one is eternally loyal to you. Remember, you punished it absolutely brutally just minutes ago and yet it is still right here pledging its oath toward you as hard as ever."

Astrid was aggressively biting and peeling the skin off her thumb in anger. "You are getting it completely wrong. That was not the case."

Jax let out a dramatically relieved sigh. "That is great to hear. But would you care to share what it actually was then?"

Astrid fumbled over her words. "I was figuring out ways to humiliate you properly. So do not go reading my pause as some illogical reasoning or even hesitation."

Jax wore a terrified face on the surface while mocking her clean beneath it. "So have you figured it out?"

A smirk reclaimed Astrid’s face. "First, strip. Drop your pants and let me see the thing clearly before I announce my judgement on the criminal."

She knew perfectly well that two separate battles were happening at once. The first was a battle of brains where Jax was shamelessly playing with her head, and she could clearly see through his act. The second was a battle of dominance and words, and in that arena she still held a huge lead.

She fully expected Jax to hesitate. And when he did, she would torment him again and keep playing him like a puppet. But her plans completely failed the instant Jax did not take a single second after her words left her mouth. He simply dropped his pants and undergarments together in one quick motion.

He spoke with a broken hollow tone. "Awaiting your next order, ma’am."

And his shameless teasing dropped the jaw of poor Astrid.

She forced herself to calm down after seeing a huge dick and the two balls casually hanging beneath it. Her thoughts spiraled instantly. ’No way that cock can fit inside my hole. Is there something I am missing from that conversation between the maids? How on earth can Aunt Adelina take that thing? Is she insane or abnormal? Or is this pervert just abnormally grown?’

She swallowed. ’Or wait. What if I am the abnormal one?’

Her cheeks were rapidly turning red from her own reasoning, but she snapped back and forced herself to focus. She could not afford to lose. She could not let herself get defeated in Jax’s game.

So she deliberately avoided looking at the horror lying on the lower floor of Jax and locked her gaze onto his face instead. Then she planted her sandal squarely onto his chest and shoved him flat onto his back.

She pressed harder. "Do not move until I say so. Scream or cry for all I care. I will only be considerate as long as you behave like a good boy."

She was doing everything to make it seem like her ego was winning. But inside she was trembling. Even her legs were shaking now as she stood over him with her feet on either side of his thighs. And for the first time in her life she was getting actual goosebumps while staring into someone’s eyes.

Well, not actually Jax’s eyes bur rather his dick’s eye. The perpendicular cock was giving her its own cold glance from below.

She noticed the trembling in her legs and started lowering herself down onto his lap. Or more precisely, onto his dick.

Jax immediately spoke up. "Umm, ma’am? I think you cannot proceed with what you are planning without your clothes off first. There is no miracle in existence that lets you..."

She shut him up by pulling off her sandal and pressing her bare foot directly over his mouth while settling onto him. Then she delivered her smirk. "I know exactly what I am doing. So shut your damn mouth."

She stood back up but turned around this time, deliberately hiding her miserable face from him while she removed her pajamas.

Jax watched from behind as her pale booty was revealed. An overwhelming urge to slap those cheeks sent his hand rising involuntarily. But before he could give her any excuse to turn this scene into an all-out fight, Astrid spun around with both hands covering her pussy like a barricade.

Her blushing face was practically on fire. "Close your eyes. That is an order."

Jax did as told while quietly watching the panicked girl through his slightly opened windows. She was staring at his dick, reaching her hand toward it then pulling back. She reached again, pulled away again. Then she innocently bought close her entire hand beside the length to measure it and went completely terrified when she placed that same measured hand size against her own pussy region, calculating that the thing would apparently reach far past her stomach.

She gulped heavily. And without actually touching his cock, she tried to simply sit herself down onto it. She silently prayed that some miracle would let her small hole devour this beast.

The instant her cold pussy lips grazed the head of his cock, Jax reached up and grabbed her ass to make her pause.

Astrid saw him staring directly at her pathetic sight and immediately cracked a slap across his blood-clotted cheek. Her voice came out broken. "How dare you... how can you just touch me there, you disgusting pervert."

Jax calmly patted his cheek. "I was genuinely just trying to help you out, because you are missing the very fundamentals. If you jump directly to the main part without anything else, it will only make things worse for you. And it will hurt a lot considering this is your first time."

Astrid clenched her fist. "I am not falling for your tricks, Jax. I know perfectly well how things are done. I take your dick, shove it inside me violently, and force it to surrender its seed. Then that seed rests inside me and gives me a baby. Simple."

Jax sighed heavily and drove his palm straight into his own face. "And where exactly did you get this incredible information?"

Astrid puffed her chest with genuine pride. "I happened to catch a conversation between two maids at the estate a few years back."

Her teeth instantly clamped down on her tongue as she realized she had just blown her cover wide open.

Jax kept his voice casual. "And what exactly did you hear?"

She deflated. Her fingers fidgeted against each other as the words reluctantly came out. "She was giving the exact same advice I just told you to the newly married maid. And I am absolutely sure she could never be wrong about it, because she was literally the only woman in our entire estate whose belly kept swelling up every time I saw her for a decade. She was basically an expert. So she was sharing her wisdom about how to please a man and how to conceive a baby."

She stared at the ground. "I was completely disgusted at that time, so I told my father about her over a year ago after hearing that. But a few days back when I actually went looking for her to get some advice, father told me he had sent her and her husband on a very far honeymoon trip to a cold mountain as a reward for her dedicated service."

She nodded with complete sincerity and obvious pride in her dad. "He was also personally taking care of her thirteen children."
